migrate-multi-delegation.title: Multi-delegation migration
migrate-multi-delegation.explainer:
Lace v2 no longer supports multi-delegation within a single account. This migration will consolidate your assets under your primary stake address and unregister any additional stake keys. This may take several minutes.

You can always update your stake selections in the Stake Center.
migrate-multi-delegation.hw.title: Confirm on your hardware wallet
migrate-multi-delegation.hw.connect-inst: Connect your hardware wallet and confirm the migration on the device.
migrate-v1.password-migration.set-passwo: Your wallets were previously protected with individual passwords. Set a single application password to secure all wallets.
Password must be at least 8 characters
migrate-v1.password-migration.activate-w: Enter the previous password for "{{walletName}}" to re-encrypt it with your new application password.
Could not re-encrypt this wallet. Please try again, and if the problem persists contact support.
<Text>Your <MultiChain>multi-chain wallet</MultiChain>, <Upgraded>upgraded</Upgraded>. <Faster>Faster</Faster>, <Smarter>smarter</Smarter>, and built for what's next.</Text>
Are you sure you want to skip "{{walletName}}"? This action cannot be undone. You can restore it later using your recovery phrase.
This may take a few seconds.
midnight.label: Midnight
cardano-bitcoin.label: Cardano / Bitcoin
midnight.network-config.proof-server-opt: The most private option. Generates proofs locally on your device, requires your own proving service. Learn how to set it up <Link>here</Link>.
Recommended for most users. Offloads proof generation to a trusted remote proof server for better performance.
midnight.resync.modal.description: This operation involves resetting your wallet's state and initiating a re-synchronisation. It's recommended to only do this operation if you're having issues with your wallet. Re-syncing can take from a few seconds to a few minutes
midnight.resync.modal.title: Warning
midnight.send-flow.processing.heading: Processing
midnight.send-flow.form.customisations.s: Transactions with shielded tokens are fully private, not logged in activity, and only the recipient sees the amount and token received—without revealing the sender.
midnight.tokens-page.header-customisatio: Tokens with the pill "Shielded" are private and only visible to you
midnight.tokens-page.midnight-designatio: This tank holds {{dustTicker}}, the shielded resource for paying Midnight transaction fees. This {{dustTicker}} level is directly dependent on your active {{nightTicker}} designation.

Designation activates {{dustTicker}} generation using your entire {{nightTicker}} balance. The {{dustTicker}} cap (the tank's maximum) is proportional to this total balance. The process of designation doesn't transfer your {{nightTicker}}
{{dustTokenTicker}} generation from this designation will stop at the previous address.
midnight.token-detail-drawer.privacy-inf: For privacy reasons, transaction records involving shielded tokens are not visible in midnight. Only activity with unshielded tokens is displayed
midnight.drawer.receive.dust-address-inf: Assigning NIGHT to this DUST address generates the DUST you'll use to pay transaction fees on Midnight.

Your wallet's encryption key was invalidated when your device's biometric settings changed. This is a security feature that cannot be reversed. To continue using your wallet, you'll need to restore it using your recovery phrase.

Your wallet's encryption key was invalidated because your device's biometric settings changed. On Android, changing fingerprints permanently removes access to protected data. To continue using your wallet, you'll need to restore it using your recovery phrase.

Your biometric authentication has been locked due to too many failed attempts. For security, your wallet's encryption key is no longer accessible. To continue using your wallet, you'll need to restore it using your recovery phrase.
Make sure you have your recovery phrase before continuing. Without it, you will permanently lose access to your funds.
authentication-prompt.android-keystore-r: Due to a device security issue, you must authenticate using your fingerprint. PIN, password or face will not work.

v2.swap.disclaimer.title: Lace Swap
v2.swap.disclaimer.body: Executing a swap requires sending your assets to a smart contract. Through an off-chain process, your order will be queued for batched execution by one or more DEX protocols. Lace provides access to third-party tools but does not endorse or guarantee the security of any third-party smart contracts or decentralized exchanges (DEXs). By accepting this quote, you acknowledge and accept the potential risks, including outages or pauses initiated by the maintainers of the involved protocols.
v2.swap.slippage.title: Adjust Slippage Tolerance
